diagrams.title: Scope Resolution Operator Uses
diagrams.description: A flowchart showing different contexts where :: is used: Global Scope, Class Scope, Namespace Scope, Enum Class, Inheritance
diagrams.purpose: Visual overview of all applications of scope resolution operator

diagrams.title: Global vs Local Variable Resolution
diagrams.description: Two overlapping boxes showing global scope and local scope, with :: acting as bridge to access global variable when same name exists locally
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how :: resolves naming conflicts between scopes

diagrams.title: Class Member Function Outside Definition
diagrams.description: Diagram showing class declaration with function prototype, and separate definition outside using ClassName:: syntax
elements: Arrow showing :: connects function to class
diagrams.purpose: Learning proper syntax for defining member functions outside class
